title: Tigerhu Kids Play Kitchen Accessories Kitchen Pretend Toy, Pretend Play Food Set& Cookware Pot& Pan Set, Pretend Vegetables Gift for Boys Girls Educational Toys
features: 🍑【Kids Kitchen Accessories Set】- Tigerhu 25 Piece Kids Kitchen Set Includes: colander, stainless steel pots and pans with lids and handles, 4 stainless steel and eleven wooden dishes, apron and a chef's hat.

🍐【Safety】 - This pot and pan playset for toddlers is made of real stainless steel and wood, safe for kids. Colorful vegetable cutting toys are made of odorless, non-toxic wood, giving kids the confidence to know and enjoy pretend cooking time.

🥕【Special Design】- The wooden kitchen toy vegetables are spread and glued together with Velcro, which makes a "crunchy" sound when cutting the vegetable toys, which can bring a sense of realism to children.
🍆【Educational Goals】- Cultivate children's color cognition in the game to train their children's hand, brain and eye coordination.

🍌【100% Satisfaction Guarantee】 Our kids kitchen toys come with a storage bag that makes storage even easier. If you have any problem with our products, please contact our customer service, 30 days money back, free lifetime warranty.
description: Product Description Cooking Apron Set The cooking apron is pink with dinosaur, the hat comes with an adjustable strap, and there is a small pocket for easy storage. Wooden toy set for cutting vegetables 9 Pieces vegetable cutting toy is sticky and makes it sound like real slicing when slicing. Just enjoy! Stainless steel pans and pots 100% high quality hand polished stainless steel metal to ensure safety. Improve ability Role-playing and role-playing games develop children's brains greatly, good for children to know about cookware and its functions. It helps to develop kid's mind, creativity and thinking ability, and train their eye coordination and hand flexibility by own operation. Child Safe Non-toxic. Meets toy standard. The children's kitchen set accessories are made of real high-quality stainless steel metal and wood. Tested to be safe for children. Wonderful gift The Tigerhu Play Kitchen Set is perfect for holidays, Christmas, birthday parties, or everyday gifts.
